checkedConditions: Shared retry backoff helper added with capped exponential full-jitter behavior.
OpenAI, Anthropic, and OpenRouter streaming retry loops use the shared jitter helper instead of fixed deterministic sleeps.
cargo fmt --check, cargo check -p jcode --lib, and git diff --check passed.
uncheckedConditions: Shared retry backoff helper computes capped exponential backoff and full-jitter delays.
Anthropic, OpenRouter/OpenAI-compatible, and OpenAI retry loops use the shared jittered helper instead of fixed 1s/2s/4s delays.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Provider retry loops now share a bounded jittered backoff primitive while preserving existing retry attempt bounds and WebSocket fallback skip behavior.
